title: VANTUNG KHUA I TUNG DING HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh’n an bang hong itna pha,
Lam bang pak zaila sa ni;
Ei a’ ding ngobang lang hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Deih teng le lai lung damna ngah ding hi;
Kum khua in la sa ni,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zaitha tawl om lo ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Zangni suah sim i um ding
Limbelh sawl siang i leng ding;
Saumang nunnuam kuam bang luah na’ng,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Va bang leng tung nuam ing ci;
Kham vang khuapi i mu ding.
